title: Korean BBQ Beef Tacos
description: A fusion twist on traditional tacos, featuring marinated Korean BBQ beef, crunchy green slaw, and a spicy kick.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, Korean chili flakes, and lime juice. Add sliced flank steak and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Remove steak from marinade and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
In a separate bowl, combine shredded cabbage, grated carrots, and chopped cilantro.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by slicing cooked steak against the grain, then topping with slaw and serving immediately.
